name: Forest
visual_description: A dense primordial forest sprawls across the landscape, ferns towering like columns beneath a hazy canopy. Crumbling stone structures—weathered walls and fractured pillars—emerge from the overgrown vegetation. Massive dinosaurs with dusty brown and slate-grey hides move through the undergrowth. Vines and predatory plants reclaim the ruins, blending ancient civilization with wild, untamed nature.
full_prompt: A dense primordial forest sprawls across the landscape, ferns towering like columns beneath a hazy canopy. Crumbling stone structures—weathered walls and fractured pillars—emerge from the overgrown vegetation. Massive dinosaurs with dusty brown and slate-grey hides move through the undergrowth. Vines and predatory plants reclaim the ruins, blending ancient civilization with wild, untamed nature.. Stylized digital illustration, panoramic landscape, dramatic atmospheric perspective, concept-art establishing shot, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
